mapper.sql: id, title, content, type, is_read, deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tbl_notification WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_notification (title, content, type, is_read, deleted, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{type}, 0, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update:
UPDATE tbl_notification
update_time = NOW(), is_read = #{isRead}, title = #{title}, content = #{content},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE tbl_notification SET is_read = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE deleted = 0 AND is_read = 0
UPDATE tbl_notification SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
